facebook.caption:
754 reviews. 4.6 stars. Under $10 a bowl.

Phở bò Nam Định on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where locals in Phú Quốc actually eat breakfast. Northern-style beef pho, clear broth, the real thing. Not the resort version.

If your Phu Quoc trip doesn't start with a bowl like this, you're doing it wrong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the broth hit the bowl. Phở bò Nam Định, 108 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 754 reviews at 4.6 stars and it costs less than your airport coffee. Go early. Go hungry.
